DP.270.0004:
Rowan: Ah, [0103,0000]!
What timing!\f
Those Team Galactic scoundrels are
after the legendary Pokémon!\f
You’ve got to help Dawn!
DP.270.0005:
Rowan: Ah, [0103,0000]!
What timing!\f
Those Team Galactic scoundrels are
after the legendary Pokémon!\f
[0103,0000], help us!
You’ve got to help Lucas!
DP.270.0006:
Rowan: How dare you!
You misguided thugs!\f
DP.270.0008:
Rowan: How dare you!
You misguided thugs!\f
DP.270.0010:
Ow! Ouch!
What’s with this old-timer?
DP.270.0011:
Dawn: [0103,0000]!
It’s T-Team Galactic!\r
Oh no! The Pokémon of the lake...
DP.270.0012:
Lucas: It’s Team Galactic!
They took the Pokémon of the lake...
DP.270.0013:
Mars: That face...!
It brings back bad memories!\f
I’m talking about the windworks!\f
I caught a whole lot of trouble
for that little incident.\f
What’s with that look on your face?
You do remember me, don’t you?\f
Fine, whatever.
I’ll tell you who I am again!\f
I’m Mars, one of Team Galactic’s
Commanders.\f
So, what is it? Are you some
lovey-dovey couple to the rescue?\f
Not a chance! Not even a teeny one!
You’re all going down!\f
DP.270.0014:
I lost again...\f
So, first the windworks, and now
Lake Verity that I owe you for!\f
This shouldn’t be happening to Team
Galactic’s Commander...\f
...Calm down, Mars...
I’ve done my part in all of this...\f
My mission was to transport the
lake’s Pokémon to our HQ...\f
...That’s right! I accomplished my
mission without a problem!\f
DP.270.0015:
Team! We’re pulling out!
The boss is waiting at the HQ!\f
DP.270.0016:
The Pokémon of the three lakes are
connected somehow.\f
Thanks to Saturn’s grandstanding at
Lake Valor, a cavern appeared here.\f
It was the cavern where the Pokémon
MESPRIT slept.\f
MESPRIT appeared, too, probably to
go help its friends.\f
That worked out well for us.
It was super easy to catch.\f
So, now we’ve got them all:
MESPRIT, “the Being of Emotion.”\r
AZELF, “the Being of Willpower.”\r
UXIE, “the Being of Intelligence.”\f
Now that we have them all...\f
You can look forward to what plans
Team Galactic has for them!\f
DP.270.0017:
Rowan: I see...
This also occurred at Lake Valor...\f
Another legendary Pokémon was taken
away by Team Galactic...\f
Both of you went up against
full-fledged criminals...\f
The fact that you’re unharmed is
reason enough to celebrate.\f
...But what about Lake Acuity?
Is [0103,0000] safe?
DP.270.0018:
Rowan: [0103,0000], I need you to
go to Lake Acuity right away.\f
I’m worried about [0103,0001].
DP.270.0019:
Dawn: [0103,0000], what is Team
Galactic up to?\f
Are the abducted Pokémon of the
lakes going to be OK?
DP.270.0020:
Lucas: [0103,0000], what’s Team
Galactic up to?\f
They’d better not harm the Pokémon
they took from the lakes...
